creator: bill.brinzer@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the patch!

META.json for p5-Email-Sender 0.102370 has a dependency on
p5-Capture-Tiny 0.08, so I submitted PR ports/150118 to update
devel/p5-Capture-Tiny to 0.08.

(<http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/RJBS/Email-Sender-0.102370/META.json>)

Attached is the original patch plus a Makefile update to require
p5-Capture-Tiny >= 0.08.

Bill Brinzer
